news.t: High Dividend ETFs: A 2026 Sector Perspective

holdings.infoBox: SDOG is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company stock at 4.21%, Texas Instruments at 3.04%, Microchip Technology at 3.00%, CVS Health at 2.45%, and HP Inc. at 2.41%.

overview.description: The ALPS Sector Dividend Dogs ETF (SDOG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S-Network Sector Dividend Dogs index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of the five highest-yielding S&P 500 securities in each sector. SDOG was launched on Jun 29, 2012 and is issued by SS&C.

data.title: High Dividend ETFs: A 2026 Sector Perspective
data.text: While the S&P 500 has recovered from late-March lows, the low single-digit gains in 2026 for the broader market have left some investors seeking alternatives. Growth stocks have lagged some value-orie...
